auth.loginSubtitle: Admin-only console for moderation, announcements, and deletion review.
auth.noAccessBody: This account is not authorised for the admin portal. Sign out and try again with an admin account.
auth.syncErrorBody: We signed you in, but couldn't reach the server to confirm your access. Check your connection and try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

scamOverview.title: Scam landscape
scamOverview.sourceNote: News outlet that reported the case. Counts only crawler-imported reports.
scamOverview.dailyNote: Bucketed by verified date (falls back to created date).
